permissions.name: phone-microphone
permissions.desc: Required for voice input as a backup to glasses hardware.

permissions.name: g2-microphone
permissions.desc: Required for real-time English speech recognition and coaching.

permissions.name: location
permissions.desc: Required for secure Bluetooth connection with G2 hardware.

permissions.name: camera
permissions.desc: Required for vision-assisted features and sensor stability.

permissions.name: activity-recognition
permissions.desc: Required for detecting wearable motion and posture.

permissions.name: proximity
permissions.desc: Required for high-accuracy wear status detection from G2 sensors.

permissions.name: network
permissions.desc: Required for Gemini AI English coaching and local development assets.
